psalm-73-1.verse: Surely God is good to Israel, To those who are pure in heart!
psalm-73-1.prayer: Lord, thank You for being good to those who seek You with a pure heart. Help me trust Your goodness even when life feels confusing.

psalm-73-2.verse: But as for me, my feet came close to stumbling, My steps had almost slipped.
psalm-73-2.prayer: Father, when my steps feel unsteady and my faith feels weak, hold me close and keep me from slipping away from Your truth.

psalm-73-3.verse: For I was envious of the arrogant As I saw the prosperity of the wicked.
psalm-73-3.prayer: Lord, guard my heart from envy when I see others prosper. Help me focus on Your faithfulness instead of comparing my life to others.

psalm-73-4.verse: For there are no pains in their death, And their body is fat.
psalm-73-4.prayer: Father, when it seems like others live without struggle, remind me that appearances do not reveal the whole story.

psalm-73-5.verse: They are not in trouble as other men, Nor are they plagued like mankind.
psalm-73-5.prayer: Lord, keep my heart from frustration when life feels unfair. Help me trust that You see clearly and judge rightly.

psalm-73-6.verse: Therefore pride is their necklace; The garment of violence covers them.
psalm-73-6.prayer: Father, protect me from pride and arrogance. Clothe me instead with humility, compassion, and obedience.

psalm-73-7.verse: Their eye bulges from fatness; The imaginations of their heart run riot.
psalm-73-7.prayer: Lord, guard my desires from greed and selfishness. Teach me to be content in You and satisfied by Your presence.

psalm-73-8.verse: They mock and wickedly speak of oppression; They speak from on high.
psalm-73-8.prayer: Father, keep my words from arrogance, cruelty, or pride. Let my speech reflect truth, kindness, and wisdom.

psalm-73-9.verse: They have set their mouth against the heavens, And their tongue parades through the earth.
psalm-73-9.prayer: Lord, protect me from speaking as though I am above others. Help me walk humbly under Your authority.

psalm-73-10.verse: Therefore his people return to this place, And waters of abundance are drunk by them.
psalm-73-10.prayer: Father, give me discernment when people are influenced by false success or empty promises. Keep my heart anchored in Your truth.

psalm-73-11.verse: They say, “How does God know? And is there knowledge with the Most High?”
psalm-73-11.prayer: Lord, remind me that You see everything. Nothing is hidden from Your knowledge, wisdom, or justice.

psalm-73-12.verse: Behold, these are the wicked; And always at ease, they have increased in wealth.
psalm-73-12.prayer: Father, when the wicked seem at ease, help me remember that temporary prosperity is not the same as eternal security.

psalm-73-13.verse: Surely in vain I have kept my heart pure And washed my hands in innocence;
psalm-73-13.prayer: Lord, when I wonder whether faithfulness is worth it, remind me that walking with You is never empty or wasted.

psalm-73-14.verse: For I have been stricken all day long And chastened every morning.
psalm-73-14.prayer: Father, when discipline, hardship, or correction comes, help me trust that You are shaping my heart for good.

psalm-73-15.verse: If I had said, “I will speak thus,” Behold, I would have betrayed the generation of Your children.
psalm-73-15.prayer: Lord, guard my words when I am confused or discouraged. Help me not lead others into doubt, but bring my questions honestly to You.

psalm-73-16.verse: When I pondered to understand this, It was troublesome in my sight
psalm-73-16.prayer: Father, when I cannot understand what I see, give me patience, humility, and faith to wait for Your wisdom.

psalm-73-17.verse: Until I came into the sanctuary of God; Then I perceived their end.
psalm-73-17.prayer: Lord, bring me into Your presence and help me see life from Your eternal perspective.

psalm-73-18.verse: Surely You set them in slippery places; You cast them down to destruction.
psalm-73-18.prayer: Father, remind me that life built apart from You stands on unstable ground. Keep my feet firmly planted in Your truth.

psalm-73-19.verse: How they are destroyed in a moment! They are utterly swept away by sudden terrors!
psalm-73-19.prayer: Lord, help me remember how quickly earthly security can disappear. Teach me to build my life on what is eternal.

psalm-73-20.verse: Like a dream when one awakes, O Lord, when aroused, You will despise their form.
psalm-73-20.prayer: Father, let temporary things lose their power over my heart. Help me seek what lasts forever in Your kingdom.

psalm-73-21.verse: When my heart was embittered And I was pierced within,
psalm-73-21.prayer: Lord, when my heart becomes bitter or wounded, soften me with Your mercy and restore my peace.

psalm-73-22.verse: Then I was senseless and ignorant; I was like a beast before You.
psalm-73-22.prayer: Father, forgive me when I lack understanding or respond with foolishness. Teach me wisdom and humility.

psalm-73-23.verse: Nevertheless I am continually with You; You have taken hold of my right hand.
psalm-73-23.prayer: Lord, thank You that even when I struggle, I am continually with You. Hold my right hand and guide me with Your love.

psalm-73-24.verse: With Your counsel You will guide me, And afterward receive me to glory.
psalm-73-24.prayer: Father, guide me with Your counsel and lead me toward the hope and glory found in Your presence.

psalm-73-25.verse: Whom have I in heaven but You? And besides You, I desire nothing on earth.
psalm-73-25.prayer: Lord, whom have I in heaven but You? Help me desire You above everything on earth.

psalm-73-26.verse: My flesh and my heart may fail, But God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever.
psalm-73-26.prayer: Father, when my flesh and heart fail, be the strength of my heart and my portion forever.

psalm-73-27.verse: For, behold, those who are far from You will perish; You have destroyed all those who are unfaithful to You.
psalm-73-27.prayer: Lord, keep me close to You and protect me from anything that would pull my heart away from Your presence.

psalm-73-28.verse: But as for me, the nearness of God is my good; I have made the Lord God my refuge, That I may tell of all Your works.
psalm-73-28.prayer: Father, it is good for me to draw near to You. Help me make You my refuge and declare all Your works with gratitude and faith.

psalm-73-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for being my strength, my portion, and my refuge. When life feels unfair or confusing, bring me into Your presence and help me see with eternal perspective. Guard my heart from envy, bitterness, and comparison, and teach me to desire You above all else. Hold my hand, guide me with Your counsel, and keep me close to You forever.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-73-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being my strength, my portion, and my refuge. When life feels unfair or confusing, bring me into Your presence and help me see with eternal perspective. Guard my heart from envy, bitterness, and comparison, and teach me to desire You above all else. Hold my hand, guide me with Your counsel, and keep me close to You forever.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
